testsuite.name: PSPCardsIntegrations.easebuzzcard

testcase.name: purchase
testcase.system-out: Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0). Provided: 500.0. Using safe fallback value. Generated First Name: john898 Generated Email: nairobiPalermoe16c0@gmail.com select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- INR select merchant name :- MASTER Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully purchaseId is not null purchaseId is not empty purchaseId format is valid: 69954bd769e2a855582bb9d5 purchaseId length is 24 purchaseId validated successfully: 69954bd769e2a855582bb9d5 Entered Card Holder Name: Yash Bahubali Entered Card Number: 5553042241984105 Entered Card Expiry Date: 07/28 Entered Card CVV: 123 Moved to the Pay button Clicked on the Pay button to proceed with payment Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment Successfully Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 69954bd769e2a855582bb9d5 Clicked on Search button UI transaction ID: 69954bd769e2a855582bb9d5 API transaction ID: 69954bd769e2a855582bb9d5 Transaction ID verified successfully UI Amount (raw): 55 API Amount: 55.0 UI Amount (parsed): 55.0 Currency conversion NOT applied Amount verified successfully UI Currency: INR API Currency: INR Currency matched correctly Currency verified successfully Expected Masked Card: 55530422****4105 UI Masked Card: 55530422****4105 Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null UI Currency: INR Payment Info Currency: INR Currency on Payment Info verified successfully UI Amount: 55.0 Payment Info Amount: 55.0 Amount on Payment Info verified successfully

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 500.0 ⚠ Amount outside valid range (10.0–100.0).
